description_long: This sculpture depicts a nude male figure standing upright on a rectangular plinth. The figure is anatomically detailed, with defined musculature and a naturalistic pose, one arm bent at the elbow and the other relaxed by the side. The left leg is slightly bent and set back, supported by a vertical strut that connects to the base. The facial features are classical and idealized, reminiscent of Greco-Roman statuary. The surface appears smooth and monochromatic, suggesting it is made from plaster or marble. The base is simple and unadorned, providing stability and focus on the figure itself.
description: A detailed, classical-style nude male figure stands on a rectangular plinth, with realistic musculature and a smooth, pale surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full frontal anatomy, facial features, and the forward position of the right arm.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bent left leg, the supporting strut, and the profile of the torso and face.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back musculature, the supporting strut, and the figure's stance on the plinth.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the relaxed right arm, the straight right leg, and the side profile of the head and torso.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is plain and does not indicate a specific setting.
